title: Linux PCIe controller driver completeness checklist
description: Generic PCIe controller checklist for host, endpoint, glue, and PHY-oriented drivers.

items: host/endpoint role is identified and source path matches it
PHY/refclk/reset and PERST# sequencing are verified
link training state and timeout handling are implemented
address window and interrupt/MSI programming match hardware

source_review_steps: Inspect probe, host bridge setup, PHY/reset/refclk sequence, address window programming, MSI/IRQ handling, and suspend/resume.
